source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: “国补”继续 第三批资金已下达
topics.official_english: Third Batch of National Subsidy Funds Released
topics.why_hot: Government subsidy continuation directly affects consumer spending and economic recovery, a topic of broad public interest.
topics.share_angle: Explain how the subsidy program works and its impact on everyday purchases like electronics and home appliances.

topics.chinese_topic: 微信朋友圈互删清空对方全部痕迹
topics.official_english: WeChat Moments Mutual Deletion Erases All Traces
topics.why_hot: Privacy and social media management are highly relatable; users debate the pros and cons of this feature.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the cultural implications of digital friendship and privacy in China's most popular social app.

topics.chinese_topic: 姆巴佩与哈兰德世界杯将首次对决
topics.official_english: Mbappé and Haaland Set for First World Cup Showdown
topics.why_hot: Two of football's biggest stars facing off in the World Cup generates massive sports fan excitement.
topics.share_angle: Compare their playing styles and what this matchup means for the tournament.

topics.chinese_topic: 高校录取通知书集体回归一页纸
topics.official_english: University Admission Letters Return to Single-Page Format
topics.why_hot: Education reform and nostalgia collide as universities simplify admission letters, sparking discussion on tradition vs. modernity.
topics.share_angle: Explore the history of Chinese admission letters and what this change says about current education trends.

topics.chinese_topic: 法国人热到不提环保了
topics.official_english: French Too Hot to Talk About Environmental Protection
topics.why_hot: Heatwave in France challenges environmental priorities, highlighting the tension between climate action and immediate comfort.
topics.share_angle: Discuss how extreme weather affects public opinion on climate policies globally.

topics.official_english: Japan Stocks Plunge, South Korea Triggers Circuit Breaker
topics.why_hot: Financial market turmoil in Asia raises concerns about global economic stability and investor sentiment.
topics.share_angle: Explain the causes and potential ripple effects of the market drops on global economy.

topics.chinese_topic: 初中学历女生因面试走红 现状曝光
topics.official_english: Middle School-Educated Woman Goes Viral for Interview, Current Status Revealed
topics.why_hot: Story of a low-education individual succeeding against odds resonates with many, sparking debate on education and opportunity.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the role of education in career success and the viral nature of inspirational stories.

topics.chinese_topic: 果园密密麻麻立满监控 当地回应
topics.official_english: Orchard Filled with Surveillance Cameras, Local Authorities Respond
topics.why_hot: Privacy concerns in rural areas and the extent of surveillance spark public debate on security vs. privacy.
topics.share_angle: Examine the balance between agricultural security and individual privacy in China's surveillance landscape.
